meaning: adj.在海洋彼岸的,横越海洋的
examples: He received a transoceanic cable from London.
When will this transoceanic bridge open to traffic?
After a week, Zhu Yingtai hits the transoceanic telephone from US.
It's the world's oldest transcontinental railway, though owing to its small size, it is typically described as transoceanic.
The current aircraft HB-SIA is effectively the prototype for the craft that will eventually be used for transoceanic flights and the round-the-world trip.
